hero.tagline: I build tools that work, not just websites.

about.bio: Full-stack developer based in Leskovac, Serbia. I build sites and web applications that help businesses grow: from eye-catching showcases to systems for sales, scheduling, and business automation. Working with local and international clients.

f1.title: A tool, not a storefront
f1.body: I don't build sites that just sit on the internet. I build tools that sell, book, and do the work for you, 24 hours a day.

f3.title: I don't vanish after payment
f3.body: Maintenance isn't an afterthought. I'm still here after launch, with a support plan that keeps the app running.

f4.title: Real software, tested
f4.body: Automated tests, secure architecture, and code built to survive real use. Not a prototype, a production system.

services.intro: Framed by outcome and ownership, not by price competition.

compare.title: A website or a web app?

does.label: What it does
does.app: Does the work: sales, bookings, accounts

visitor.label: A visitor can
visitor.app: Order, pay, book an appointment, create an account

gets.label: You get
gets.app: An admin panel: control over orders and bookings

example.label: Example
example.site: A restaurant site with a menu and map
example.app: An online shop with a cart and booking

scope.label: Scope
scope.site: A few days to two weeks

packages.title: Packages
packages.note: Included in every price: server setup, domain connection, basic SEO (Google Maps profile), and training.

start.name: START: mini site
start.includes: 1–3 pages; who you are, services, gallery, contact, map, call button; mobile-ready
start.idealFor: Tradespeople and small businesses that need to be found online

standard.name: STANDARD: full site
standard.includes: 5–10 pages; pricing, gallery, about, contact form, bilingual, basic SEO
standard.idealFor: Businesses that want a complete, professional presence

plus.name: PLUS: with booking
plus.includes: Everything in Standard + online booking with automatic reminders (email/SMS)
plus.idealFor: Salons, clinics, and services that live on appointments

app.name: WEB APP: custom-built
app.includes: An online shop, user accounts, admin panel, or a custom-built system
app.idealFor: Businesses that need a system that does the work, not just a storefront

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.tagline: Keeping the app running without interruption, built into the deal, not an optional add-on.

offer.title: Written offer
offer.body: Exact price, deliverables, and deadline. No hidden costs.

build.title: Build
build.body: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery, with periodic progress reports.

launch.title: Launch & training
launch.body: Launch, hands-on training, and Google profile setup.

maintain.title: Maintain
maintain.body: Ongoing support and changes after launch.

social.question: I have Facebook/Instagram, so why do I need a website?
social.answer: Social media is rented space and doesn't rank on Google. A website is your property and builds trust from the first visit.

outdated.question: I already have a site, but it's outdated.
outdated.answer: A redesign is priced as the matching package (usually Standard), and existing content can be migrated.

duration.question: How long does it take to build?
duration.answer: Start: about a week · Standard: 2–3 weeks · Plus: 3–4 weeks · Web app: scoped per project.

work.intro: Depth over breadth: two projects that say more than ten in a row.

cajs.role: Solo build, from idea to production
cajs.title: Optika Cajs
cajs.summary: A complete online system for a local optical shop: an online store, a prescription-lens configurator, and eye-exam booking, all in one place. Not a storefront that just sits on the internet, but a tool that sells and books appointments 24 hours a day.

skedio.label: Product
skedio.title: Skedio
skedio.summary: A booking SaaS built for salons, clinics, spas, and gyms. A product in progress, outside client work.

contact.intro: Have a project in mind? Let's talk. No pressure, no invoice.
contact.consult: The first 30 minutes are a free, no-obligation call.

meta.title: Optika Cajs: Case Study
meta.description: A complete online system for a local optical shop: an online store, a prescription-lens configurator, and eye-exam booking, built from scratch and shipped to production solo.

hero.title: Optika Cajs
hero.tagline: A complete online system for a local optical shop: an online store, a prescription-lens configurator, and eye-exam booking, built from scratch and shipped to production solo.

challenge.body: Optika Cajs had a physical shop but no online presence at all: no way to sell, book, or configure prescription lenses online. Every inquiry meant a phone call or a shop visit. The goal was a system that keeps working outside business hours: selling, booking, and keeping records without extra staff.

shop.title: Online store
shop.body: A full glasses-and-lenses store with categories, search, and a cart, built to actually sell, not just display a catalog.

configurator.title: Prescription-lens configurator
configurator.body: Step-by-step selection of strength, lens type, and add-ons, with a live-updating price, the most complex part of the system.

accounts.title: Customer accounts
accounts.body: Sign-up, order history, and saved prescription data for faster repeat orders.

booking.title: Eye-exam booking
booking.body: Online booking for eye exams, with confirmation and reminders, no phone calls required.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.body: Manage products, orders, and appointments from one place, without touching code.

tech.title: Secure architecture
tech.body: HMAC SHA-256 signing for sensitive operations, a containerized environment, and a database designed to scale.

testing.title: Automated testing
testing.body: 24 automated tests cover the critical flows (shop, configurator, and booking) before every release.

responsive.title: Responsive design
responsive.body: The same experience on phone, tablet, and desktop. Most customers arrive on mobile.

sales.title: Sales around the clock
sales.body: The shop now sells outside business hours. An order doesn't wait for the doors to open.

booking.title: Fewer phone calls
booking.body: Exam bookings go straight through the site, without loading extra work onto staff on the phone.

visibility.title: Online visibility
visibility.body: A local optical shop now has an online presence comparable to much bigger chains.

ownership.title: Full ownership
ownership.body: Code, content, and data have belonged to Optika Cajs from day one, with no lock-in to an agency or platform.

meta.title: Skedio: Case Study
meta.description: A scheduling and CRM SaaS I'm building for Serbian appointment businesses: 24/7 online booking, a team calendar, client records, and automated WhatsApp reminders, built solo from scratch.

hero.title: Skedio
hero.tagline: A scheduling and CRM platform for appointment-based businesses in Serbia: online booking, a team calendar, client records, and automated WhatsApp reminders. A product I'm building solo, from scratch.

problem.body: Salons, clinics, barbers, and gyms across Serbia still run on a paper diary and a ringing phone. Every missed call is a lost booking, every no-show is wasted time, and the foreign scheduling tools that exist ignore how business is actually done here: WhatsApp instead of email that goes unread, and hours and habits that don't match. Skedio is built for this market specifically: appointments are confirmed and reminders arrive over WhatsApp.

booking.title: 24/7 online booking
booking.body: A public booking page for each business: clients pick a service, staff member, and time slot and book themselves, day or night, no phone call needed.

calendar.title: Team calendar
calendar.body: Week time-grid and month views of every staff member's appointments, with statuses color-coded and completed or canceled slots greyed out.

crm.title: Built-in client records
crm.body: A lightweight CRM: every client's history in one place, deduplicated by normalized phone number so the same person never fragments into two records.

staff.title: Staff management
staff.body: Add staff members, set their working hours and services, and give each their own bookable calendar and availability.

services.title: Service catalog
services.body: Define services with a duration and price; availability and slot lengths are generated from them automatically.

analytics.title: Dashboard & analytics
analytics.body: A home dashboard with the day's appointments and the metrics that matter, computed correctly against the local Belgrade calendar day.

reminders.title: Automated WhatsApp reminders
reminders.body: A scheduled job sends WhatsApp reminders a configurable number of hours before each appointment, each with a one-tap self-cancel link.

onboarding.title: Ten-minute onboarding
onboarding.body: A first-run wizard takes a non-technical owner from signup to a live, bookable page in about ten minutes. No manual, no training call.

data.title: Supabase + PostgreSQL
data.body: Auth, data, and row-level access on Supabase Postgres, with the schema managed through versioned migrations.

billing.title: Subscriptions
billing.body: Paid plans and billing handled through Lemon Squeezy, so the product can charge from day one.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp via Twilio
whatsapp.body: Reminders are queued in the database and dispatched by a cron-triggered endpoint through Twilio, with per-message delivery status tracked.

email.title: Transactional email & monitoring
email.body: Booking and confirmation emails through Resend; runtime errors and performance watched with Sentry and Vercel analytics.

timezone.title: Timezone-correct by design
timezone.body: Every time is stored in UTC and converted to Europe/Belgrade for display and slot math, with no naive server-clock bugs across daylight-saving changes.

availability.title: Availability engine
availability.body: Bookable slots are generated with a 15-minute buffer around every appointment, guarded at the database level by an exclusion constraint so two bookings can never overlap.

shots.dashboard: Skedio dashboard with the day's appointments and metrics
shots.calendar: Skedio week calendar showing staff appointments

status.body: Skedio is in active development and pre-launch: the app is built and running at app.skedio.rs, and the marketing site has been rebuilt on Next.js. Everything now points at a single goal: free-trial signups from owners who want to stop losing time to the paper diary. The near-term roadmap is growing the user base, featured businesses, and polishing reliability and user experience.
